article_title: FDA Expands argenx's VYVGART to All Adult Myasthenia Gravis Serotypes, Reaching Seronegative Patients for the First Time
summary: FDA expansion of VYVGART/efgartigimod to all gMG serotypes — all 4 sources fetched and every cited claim, quote, and statistic verified against snapshots; allowlist warning is non-substantive (Globe Newswire is the official argenx PR distribution channel, Euronext mirrors it, MDA is the patient advocacy primary source, RTTNews provides financial context).

content_preview.title: FDA Expands argenx's VYVGART to All Adult Myasthenia Gravis Serotypes, Reaching Seronegative Patients for the First Time
content_preview.summary: The May 8 sBLA approval extends efgartigimod's label to MuSK, LRP4 and triple-seronegative gMG patients after the 119-patient ADAPT SERON trial hit its MG-ADL endpoint with a 3.35-point improvement at week 4 (p=0.0068).
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

The U.S. Food and Drug Administration on May 8, 2026 approved a label expansion for argenx's VYVGART (efgartigimod alfa-fcab) and VYVGART Hytrulo (efgartigimod alfa and hyaluronidase-qvfc), extending the antibody therapy to all adult patients living with generalized myasthenia gravis (gMG) regardless of antibody serotype, [argenx announced](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/05/08/3291372/0/en/argenx-announces-u-s-fda-approval-expanding-vyvgart-and-vyvgart-hytrulo-for-u...

recommendations: Consider adding live.euronext.com, mda.org and rttnews.com to config/source_allowlist.txt — all three are reputable primary or established financial outlets that the bot will likely cite again.

editor_notes.content_quality: Tightly written News piece (514 words) with Overview / What We Know / Commercial Context / What We Don't Know structure. Numbers, trial design, and quotes are precise and attributed inline.
editor_notes.source_verification: All 4 snapshots fetched at HTTP 200, decompressed, and grep-verified per-claim. source-0 (Globe Newswire / argenx press release): confirms May 8 2026 sBLA approval, ADAPT SERON, 119 patients, MG-ADL 3.35-point improvement at week 4, p=0.0068, Truyen and Howard quotes verbatim. source-1 (Euronext mirror of argenx PR): same content, confirms Truyen quote and trial figures. source-2 (MDA press release): confirms ~20% seronegative figure, Mozaffar quote 'Patients with seronegative generalized myasthenia gravis have historically had limited treatment options, and many clinical trials have excluded them' verbatim, and Angela Lek quote 'People living with seronegative generalized myasthenia gravis often face a longer, more complicated journey to diagnosis and treatment' verbatim. source-3 (RTTNews): confirms 'the largest to date in antibody-negative gMG' phrasing, $4.2B 2025 sales, $1.3B Q1 2026 vs $0.8B prior year, $782.17 close, $802.18 pre-market, December 2021 and June 20 2023 approval dates. No hallucinated quotes or unsupported specifics found.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Every specific (trial size, p-value, mean improvement, sales figures, share price, prior approval dates) traces to a cited snapshot. Headline, summary, and Overview lead are all backed by source-0 / source-1.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral, professional, no editorializing. 'What We Don't Know' section appropriately scopes the open questions.
editor_notes.originality: No prior VYVGART/argenx/myasthenia-gravis coverage in 2026-05. Distinct from the 2026-05-03 Chiesi-KalVista deal and 2026-05-04 FDA Veppanu approval — same FDA-approval beat, different drugs and indications.
recommendations: Add live.euronext.com, mda.org, rttnews.com to config/source_allowlist.txt to suppress the soft warning on future biotech-PR articles.

source_verification_per_url.notes: argenx official PR — confirms FDA approval, ADAPT SERON design, primary-endpoint numbers, Truyen and Howard quotes.
Euronext mirror of the same argenx PR; confirms Truyen quote and trial figures.
Muscular Dystrophy Association press release — confirms ~20% seronegative figure, Mozaffar and Lek quotes verbatim.

RTTNews — confirms 'largest to date in antibody-negative gMG' phrasing, all financial figures (FY2025 $4.2B, Q1 2026 $1.3B vs $0.8B, $782.17 close, $802.18 pre-market), historical approval dates (Dec 2021, June 20 2023).

editor_notes.verdict_override_rationale: Automated script returned APPROVE_WITH_CORRECTIONS solely due to allowlist warnings (live.euronext.com, mda.org, rttnews.com not yet listed). All three are legitimate primary/financial sources, all snapshots returned HTTP 200, every claim was verified. No factual correction is needed; the warning is configuration housekeeping, not a content defect. Overriding to APPROVE per the v3.9.0 false-positive override path.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Clean APPROVE. Strong biotech reporting with verified primary-source attribution and balanced 'What We Don't Know' scoping.
